case_title: MONTGOMERY, LEONARD C. VS CHU, ARTHUR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY MONTGOMERY, LEONARD C. AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, ARTHUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-24-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-12-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-12-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-24-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
